stemHtml: An aircraft has PBN capabilities of RNP10, RNAV5, basic RNP1, and RNP APCH. Per ICAO Doc 4444, what should be entered in Item 10 and Item 18 of the flight plan?

options.a: Item 10: R; Item 18: PBN/A1 B1 B2 B3 O1 S1
options.b: Item 10: R; Item 18: A1, B1, B2, B3, O1, S1
options.c: Item 10: PBN; Item 18: A1, B1, B2, B3, O1, S1
options.d: Item 10: R; Item 18: PBN/A1 B1 B2 B3 O1 S2
